nodes.label: Phase 2: Move Groq LLM calls behind authenticated backend proxy
nodes.rationale: GROQ_API_KEY was shipping to the browser via VITE_ prefix; adding Vercel Serverless Functions under api/ that hold the key server-side and verify Firebase ID tokens via firebase-admin closes this exposure while keeping aiText/aiJson call sites unchanged.
nodes.norm_label: phase 2: move groq llm calls behind authenticated backend proxy

nodes.label: Task 10: Stop stale voice transcripts landing on wrong interview question
nodes.norm_label: task 10: stop stale voice transcripts landing on wrong interview question

nodes.label: Task 11: Validate roadmap resourceUrl before rendering as a link (XSS)
nodes.rationale: resourceUrl comes straight from the LLM's JSON response and is rendered as <a href>; an hallucinated/injected javascript:/data: URL could execute in the app's origin on click, so a http(s)-only scheme allowlist (safeUrl) is added.
nodes.norm_label: task 11: validate roadmap resourceurl before rendering as a link (xss)

nodes.label: Port AI API to Cloudflare Pages Functions Implementation Plan
nodes.norm_label: port ai api to cloudflare pages functions implementation plan

nodes.label: jose (JWT verification library)
nodes.rationale: jose is fully ESM and Workers-native, avoiding the CommonJS/ESM crash previously hit on Vercel; used to verify Firebase ID tokens by hand instead of firebase-admin.

nodes.label: Decision to avoid firebase-admin in functions/
nodes.rationale: firebase-admin is not reliably supported on the Cloudflare Workers runtime, so Firebase ID token verification is reimplemented manually with jose against Google's public JWKS instead.
nodes.norm_label: decision to avoid firebase-admin in functions/

nodes.label: src/lib/ai.ts (shared client contract)
nodes.rationale: Shared by both Vercel and Cloudflare deployments; the port must preserve the /api/ai/complete and /api/ai/transcribe request/response contracts exactly so this file works unchanged against either backend.

nodes.label: Groq REST API (chat completions + audio transcriptions)
nodes.norm_label: groq rest api (chat completions + audio transcriptions)

nodes.label: Cloudflare Pages deployment (career-genie.pages.dev)
nodes.rationale: Cloudflare Pages auto-detects a functions/ directory at the project root and maps files to routes the same way Vercel maps api/, so no wrangler.toml is needed for routing.
